data.title: Quarterhill appoints Burland East to Board of Directors, effective immediately. TSX: QTRH, OTCQX: QTRHF. Dec 23, 2025.
data.description: In Toronto on December 23, 2025, Quarterhill Inc. revealed the addition of Burland East to its Board of Directors. Quarterhill, a prominent global company specializing in intelligent transportation system solutions, made the announcement. The company, listed on both the TSX (QTRH) and OTCQX (QTRHF), highlighted the significance of East's appointment to the board.

data.title: Royce Small-Cap Trust (NYSE: RVT) is a leading small-cap closed-end fund with an average weekly trading volume of 1,170,399 shares. NAV is $18.23, MKT is $16.25 as of Nov 30, 2025. Adviser has 50+ years of small- and micro-cap investment experience.
data.description: The oldest and biggest small-cap closed-end fund, with an average weekly trading volume of around 1,170,399 shares, is overseen by an adviser with over 50 years of expertise in small- and micro-cap investments. As of November 30, 2025, the closing prices are NAV $18.23 and MKT $16.25.
SYNERGIE boosts Swiss presence by acquiring majority of House of Flexwork Group in a strategic move.
Umicore releases transparency statement regarding Millennium International Management LP.
JP Morgan Asset Management Holdings Inc. discloses owning 5.4% of Umicore.

data.title: YMCA SF serves 130,000 people, invests in communities across SF, San Mateo, and Marin counties.
data.description: An annual report released by the YMCA of Greater San Francisco reveals that the organization has served 130,000 individuals and made significant investments in communities spanning across San Francisco, San Mateo, and Marin counties. The report highlights the YMCA's commitment to fostering a sense of belonging, providing resources, and promoting growth within these areas.

data.title: Dow rises, J&J ordered to pay $1.5B in lawsuit. Novo stock up on FDA approval. GDP surprises in Q3.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a rise as a result of the unexpected third-quarter GDP data. Novo stock also saw a significant increase following the FDA's approval of their weight loss pill. Additionally, Johnson & Johnson faces a court order to pay $1.5 billion in a talc lawsuit. These updates were part of the live coverage of the stock market for the day.
FRANCE DEMANDS EU ACTION TO COUNTER CHINESE DUTIES ON DAIRY

data.title: MATIC price at $0.38 faces pressure from holiday trading, risking breakdown below crucial support as year-end nears.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Polygon (MATIC) is currently trading at $0.38 with low trading volumes due to the holiday season. Technical analysis suggests that there is a possibility of a breakdown below crucial support levels as the year comes to an end.

data.title: Dept. of Ed. to notify 1,000 of 5M student loan defaulters about wage garnishments, starting Jan. 7, 2026.
data.description: On January 7th, the Department of Education will initiate the distribution of notices regarding paycheck deductions to approximately 1,000 out of a total of five million borrowers who are in default.

data.title: BigPirate launches today, offering a narrative-driven social casino for the US market, aiming to set the standard in free-to-play gaming.
data.description: Today marks the official launch of BigPirate, a new social casino aimed at the US market. The platform offers a unique narrative-driven experience centered around high-quality social slots. BigPirate is designed to foster strong engagement and community growth, setting a new benchmark in free-to-play gaming. With a focus on delivering a rich and immersive experience, BigPirate aims to attract a wide audience seeking interactive and social gameplay.

data.title: DOGE hits $0.13 amid 3% drop, mimicking Bitcoin's volatility in low holiday trade. Technicals display mixed signs.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Dogecoin is currently valued at $0.13, reflecting a 3% decrease in its daily trading value. Technical analysis indicates conflicting signals for the meme coin, which closely follows the recent erratic movements of Bitcoin. This trend is observed during a period of low trading activity due to the holiday season.

data.title: THE.Hosting in Netherlands reveals 2025 milestones and plans for 2026 expansion after successful year.
data.description: In Enschede, Netherlands, on December 23, 2025, THE.Hosting, a global supplier of top-performing VPS and dedicated servers, is reflecting on a prosperous 2025 and unveiling its strategic goals for 2026. Throughout the year, the company achieved notable success, with significant growth in numbers, and is now focused on expanding further in the upcoming year.

data.title: SOL price hits $125 support level amid low holiday volume, trading at $124.66 with mixed technical signals.
data.description: Solana is currently priced at $124.66, reflecting a 1.7% decrease amidst a subdued holiday trading session in the cryptocurrency markets. Technical indicators indicate mixed signals, particularly around a critical support level.

data.title: TRA Medical Imaging & Tacoma-Pierce Athletic Commission partner to offer free/reduced imaging for needy student athletes in Pierce County.
data.description: A partnership between TRA Medical Imaging and the Tacoma-Pierce Athletic Commission has been established to offer no-cost and discounted diagnostic imaging services to student athletes in Pierce County. This collaboration aims to assist athletes who are experiencing financial difficulties, providing them with the opportunity to have their injuries assessed and treated without financial burden. This initiative seeks to support the health and well-being of the community by offering access to essential medical services.

data.title: The Village at East Farms partners with American Parkinson Disease Association for 'Ask the Doctor' event on Jan 23. Dr. Benjamin Dorfman from Hartford HealthCare to discuss Parkinson's treatments.
data.description: On December 22, 2025, Neurologist Dr. Benjamin Dorfman from the prestigious Hartford HealthCare Chase Family Movement Disorder Center will be discussing Parkinson's treatments and related topics in Waterbury, Connecticut. The event will take place at The Village at East Farms, a Benchmark assisted living and Mind & Memory Care community. This informative session aims to shed light on important treatment options and advancements in Parkinson's disease.

data.title: Sei's grid boosts onchain capital with stable assets, tokenization, & cross-network settlement, optimizing financial operations for enterprises.
data.description: Sei's Market Infrastructure Grid has launched a new Capital System, which aims to improve onchain financial activities by incorporating stable assets, tokenization, and cross-network settlement. This system provides enterprises with a unified capital management framework to streamline operations. This initiative is set to have a significant impact on the industry, with an estimated total investment of millions of dollars. For further details, feel free to click on the link provided.
